acceptance_criteria.text: Security leftovers, approval-boundary audit, social-post simplification, quality gate, and legacy cleanup are implemented and verified locally.
proof: Wordstat runtime config and legacy docs no longer contain hardcoded client credentials.
Approval-boundary audit passes in focused pytest.
Social-posts runtime schema creation was replaced with an Alembic migration presence guard.
Social-post write actions have per-user/action rate limiting.
Premature agent social.post capability/provider registry entries were removed.
local_quality_gate.sh completed successfully with pytest, pip-audit, npm audit, build, lint, changed-file lint, and typecheck.
Legacy debug/repro/fix/reset artifacts were moved under archive/legacy-runbooks.
gaps: Wordstat key rotation must happen outside the repository.
Production deploy was not performed in this proof bundle.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_approval_boundaries_audit.py tests/test_security_runtime_config.py tests/test_social_post_service.py tests/test_social_posts_api.py

rg -n "623b9605|8ec666a|verify=False|social\\.post\\.draft|social\\.post\\.publish_api|social_channels|CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS social_posts|ALTER TABLE social_posts" src tests scripts docs --glob '!frontend/dist/**'
known_gaps: External Wordstat secret rotation is still required.
Existing broad frontend lint warnings remain as baseline debt; changed frontend files now fail on warnings.
